scripts.apk:debug: set GRADLE_USER_HOME=C:\gcache&& cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug --no-daemon --no-build-cache --no-parallel --no-watch-fs
scripts.apk:release: cmd /c "set NODE_ENV=production&& set GRADLE_USER_HOME=C:\gcache&& cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease --no-daemon --no-build-cache --no-parallel --no-watch-fs"
scripts.apk:release:arm64: cmd /c "set NODE_ENV=production&& set GRADLE_USER_HOME=C:\gcache&& cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease -PreactNativeArchitectures=arm64-v8a --no-daemon --no-build-cache --no-parallel --no-watch-fs"
scripts.apk:path: cmd /c if exist android\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk (echo android\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk) else (echo APK not found)
scripts.apk:release:path: cmd /c if exist android\app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-release.apk (echo android\app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-release.apk) else (echo Release APK not found — run npm run apk:release)
scripts.apk:release:arm64:path: cmd /c if exist android\app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-arm64-v8a-release.apk (echo android\app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-arm64-v8a-release.apk) else (echo ARM64 release APK not found — run npm run apk:release:arm64)
